86#define NATS_DEFAULT_URL "nats://localhost:4222"

97 #define JSMsgSize "Nats-Msg-Size"
98
111 #define JSMsgRollup "Nats-Rollup"
112
120 #define JSMsgRollupSubject "sub"
121
129 #define JSMsgRollupAll "all"
130
131 // Headers for republished messages and direct get.
132 #define JSStream "Nats-Stream"
133 #define JSSequence "Nats-Sequence"
134 #define JSLastSequence "Nats-Last-Sequence"
135 #define JSTimeStamp "Nats-Time-Stamp"
136 #define JSSubject "Nats-Subject"

205typedef struct __natsClientConfig
206{
207 int64_t DefaultWriteDeadline;
208
209 int64_t LockSpinCount;
210
211 // Subscription message delivery thread control
212 bool DefaultToThreadPool;
213 int ThreadPoolMax;
214
215 // Reply message delivery thread control
216 bool DefaultRepliesToThreadPool;
217 bool UseSeparatePoolForReplies;
218 int ReplyThreadPoolMax;
219
220 // Callback invoked when a thread created by the library starts
221 natsThreadStartedHandler ThreadStartedHandler;
222 void *ThreadStartedHandlerClosure;
223
224} natsClientConfig;
225

324typedef struct jsPubOptions

338} jsPubOptions;

343typedef enum
344{
345 js_LimitsPolicy = 0,
346 js_InterestPolicy,
347 js_WorkQueuePolicy,
348
349} jsRetentionPolicy;

354typedef enum
355{
356 js_DiscardOld = 0,
357 js_DiscardNew,
358
359} jsDiscardPolicy;

364typedef enum

366 js_FileStorage = 0,
367 js_MemoryStorage,

374typedef enum
375{
376 js_StorageCompressionNone = 0,

383typedef enum
384{
385 js_DeliverAll = 0,
386 js_DeliverLast,
387 js_DeliverNew,
388 js_DeliverByStartSequence,

390 js_DeliverLastPerSubject,
391
392} jsDeliverPolicy;

399 js_AckExplicit = 0,
400 js_AckNone,

402
403
404} jsAckPolicy;

409typedef enum

411 js_ReplayInstant = 0,

454{

456 const char *DeliverPrefix;

458} jsExternalStream;

472typedef struct jsStreamSource
473{
474 const char *Name;
475 uint64_t OptStartSeq;
476 int64_t OptStartTime;
477 const char *FilterSubject;
478 jsExternalStream *External;
479 // Domain and External are mutually exclusive.
480 // If Domain is set, an External value will be created with
481 // the APIPrefix constructed based on the Domain value.
482 const char *Domain;
483
484} jsStreamSource;
485
489typedef struct jsRePublish
490{
491 const char *Source;
492 const char *Destination;
493 bool HeadersOnly;
494
495} jsRePublish;

501typedef struct jsSubjectTransformConfig
502{
503 const char *Source;
504 const char *Destination;
505} jsSubjectTransformConfig;

511typedef struct jsStreamConsumerLimits
512{
513 int64_t InactiveThreshold;
514 int MaxAckPending;
515} jsStreamConsumerLimits;

596typedef struct jsStreamConfig {
597 const char *Name;
598 const char *Description;
599 const char **Subjects;
600 int SubjectsLen;
601 jsRetentionPolicy Retention;
602 int64_t MaxConsumers;
603 int64_t MaxMsgs;
604 int64_t MaxBytes;
605 int64_t MaxAge;
606 int64_t MaxMsgsPerSubject;
607 int32_t MaxMsgSize;
608 jsDiscardPolicy Discard;
609 jsStorageType Storage;
610 int64_t Replicas;
611 bool NoAck;
612 const char *Template;
613 int64_t Duplicates;
614 jsPlacement *Placement;
615 jsStreamSource *Mirror;
616 jsStreamSource **Sources;
617 int SourcesLen;
618 bool Sealed;
619 bool DenyDelete;
620 bool DenyPurge;
621
624 bool AllowRollup;
625
628 jsRePublish *RePublish;
629
632 bool AllowDirect;
633
636 bool MirrorDirect;
637
640 bool DiscardNewPerSubject;
641
645 natsMetadata Metadata;
646
649 jsStorageCompression Compression;
650
652 uint64_t FirstSeq;
653
656 jsSubjectTransformConfig SubjectTransform;
657
660 jsStreamConsumerLimits ConsumerLimits;
661
664 bool AllowMsgTTL;
665
669 int64_t SubjectDeleteMarkerTTL;
670
673 jsPersistModeType PersistMode;
674
676 bool AllowAtomic;
677
680 bool AllowMsgCounter;
681
684 bool AllowMsgSchedules;
685
686} jsStreamConfig;
687

753typedef struct jsStreamState

765 int DeletedLen;
766 jsLostStreamData *Lost;
767 int64_t Consumers;
768
769} jsStreamState;

919typedef struct jsConsumerConfig
920{
921 const char *Name;
922 const char *Durable;
923 const char *Description;
924 jsDeliverPolicy DeliverPolicy;
925 uint64_t OptStartSeq;
926 int64_t OptStartTime;
927 jsAckPolicy AckPolicy;
928 int64_t AckWait;
929 int64_t MaxDeliver;
930 int64_t *BackOff;
931 int BackOffLen;
932 const char *FilterSubject;
933 jsReplayPolicy ReplayPolicy;
934 uint64_t RateLimit;
935 const char *SampleFrequency;
936 int64_t MaxWaiting;
937 int64_t MaxAckPending;
938 bool FlowControl;
939 int64_t Heartbeat;
940 bool HeadersOnly;
941
942 // Pull based options.
943 int64_t MaxRequestBatch;
944 int64_t MaxRequestExpires;
945 int64_t MaxRequestMaxBytes;
946
947 // Push based options.
948 const char *DeliverSubject;
949 const char *DeliverGroup;
950
951 // Ephemeral inactivity threshold.
952 int64_t InactiveThreshold;
953
954 // Generally inherited by parent stream and other markers, now can be configured directly.
955 int64_t Replicas;
956 // Force memory storage.
957 bool MemoryStorage;
958
959 // Configuration options introduced in 2.10
960
961 const char **FilterSubjects;
962 int FilterSubjectsLen;
963 natsMetadata Metadata;
964
965 // Configuration options introduced in 2.11
966
970 int64_t PauseUntil;
971
975 const char *PriorityPolicy;
976
981 int64_t PinnedTTL;
982
984 const char **PriorityGroups;
985 int PriorityGroupsLen;
986} jsConsumerConfig;
987

1321 const char *LastBySubject;
1322
1323} jsDirectGetMsgOptions;

1330typedef struct jsFetchRequest
1331{
1332 int64_t Expires;
1333 int Batch;
1334 int64_t MaxBytes;
1335 bool NoWait;
1336 int64_t Heartbeat;
1337
1338 // The use of these fields require nats-server v2.11.0 or later
1339 int64_t MinPending;
1340 int64_t MinAckPending;
1341 const char *ID;
1343 const char *Group;
1344 // The use of this field require nats-server v2.12.0 or later
1345 uint8_t Priority;
1348
1349} jsFetchRequest;
1350
1372typedef void (*jsFetchCompleteHandler)(natsConnection *nc, natsSubscription *sub, natsStatus s, void *closure);
1373
1384typedef bool (*jsFetchNextHandler)(int *messages, int64_t *maxBytes, natsSubscription *sub, void *closure);
1385
1391typedef struct jsOptionsPullSubscribeAsync
1392{
1393 int64_t Timeout;
1394 int MaxMessages;
1395 int64_t MaxBytes;
1396
1404 bool NoWait;
1405
1409 jsFetchCompleteHandler CompleteHandler;
1410 void *CompleteHandlerClosure;
1411
1414 int64_t Heartbeat;
1415
1420 const char *Group;
1421
1427 int64_t MinPending;
1428
1434 int64_t MinAckPending;
1435
1439 int FetchSize;
1440
1447 int KeepAhead;
1448
1454 jsFetchNextHandler NextHandler;
1455 void *NextHandlerClosure;
1456
1457} jsOptionsPullSubscribeAsync;
1458
1464typedef struct jsOptionsPublishAsync
1465{
1466 int64_t MaxPending;
1467
1468 // If jsPubAckHandler is specified, the callback will be invoked
1469 // for every asynchronous published message, either as a positive
1470 // result, or with the error encountered when publishing that
1471 // message. If this callback is specified, ErrHandler (see below)
1472 // will be ignored.
1473 jsPubAckHandler AckHandler;
1474 void *AckHandlerClosure;
1475
1476 // This callback is invoked for messages published asynchronously
1477 // when an error is returned by the server or if the library has
1478 // timed-out waiting for an acknowledgment back from the server
1479 // (if publish uses the jsPubOptions.MaxWait).
1480 jsPubAckErrHandler ErrHandler;
1481 void *ErrHandlerClosure;
1482
1483 int64_t StallWait;
1484
1485 bool MuxReplies;
1489
1490} jsOptionsPublishAsync;
1491

1503 const char *Subject;
1504 uint64_t Sequence;
1505 uint64_t Keep;

1507} jsOptionsStreamPurge;

1537typedef struct jsOptions
1538{

1544 jsOptionsStream Stream;
1545
1546} jsOptions;

1571typedef enum

1573 kvOp_Unknown = 0,
1574 kvOp_Put,

1576 kvOp_Purge,
1577

1585typedef struct kvConfig
1586{
1587 const char *Bucket;
1588 const char *Description;
1589 int32_t MaxValueSize;
1590 uint8_t History;
1591 int64_t TTL;
1592 int64_t MaxBytes;
1593 jsStorageType StorageType;
1594 int Replicas;
1595 jsRePublish *RePublish;
1596 jsStreamSource *Mirror;
1597 jsStreamSource **Sources;
1598 int SourcesLen;
1599
1600} kvConfig;

1607typedef struct kvWatchOptions
1608{
1613 bool IgnoreDeletes;
1614
1621 bool IncludeHistory;
1622
1627 bool MetaOnly;
1628
1633 int64_t Timeout;
1634
1644 bool UpdatesOnly;
1645
1652 int64_t Heartbeat;
1653
1664 uint64_t ResumeFromRevision;
1665
1666} kvWatchOptions;
1667
1673typedef struct kvPurgeOptions
1674{
1675 // How long to wait (in milliseconds) for some operations to complete.
1676 int64_t Timeout;
1677
1678 // When calling kvStore_PurgeDeletes(), all keys that have a delete or
1679 // purge marker as the last entry are gathered and then those keys
1680 // are purged of their content, including the marker.
1681 // Starting with NATS C client v3.3.0, if this option is not specified,
1682 // only the markers older than 30 minutes will be deleted. Use this
1683 // option to set the limit or a negative value to force removal of
1684 // markers regardless of their age.
1685 // The value is expressed as a time in nanoseconds.
1686 int64_t DeleteMarkersOlderThan;
1687
1688} kvPurgeOptions;
1689

1711
1712} kvEntryList;

1736} kvKeysList;

2134typedef struct objStoreWatchOptions
2135{
2142 bool IgnoreDeletes;
2143
2150 bool UpdatesOnly;
2151
2152} objStoreWatchOptions;
2153
2154
2155#if defined(NATS_HAS_STREAMING)
2160typedef struct __stanConnection stanConnection;
2161
2166typedef struct __stanSubscription stanSubscription;
2167
2172typedef struct __stanMsg stanMsg;
2173
2178typedef struct __stanConnOptions stanConnOptions;
2179
2184typedef struct __stanSubOptions stanSubOptions;
2185#endif
2186
// end of typesGroup
2188
2189//
2190// Callbacks.
2191//
2192
2215typedef void (*natsMsgHandler)(
2216 natsConnection *nc, natsSubscription *sub, natsMsg *msg, void *closure);
2217
2231typedef void (*natsConnectionHandler)(
2232 natsConnection *nc, void *closure);
2233
2245typedef natsStatus (*natsProxyConnHandler)(
2246 natsSock *fd, char *host, int port, void *closure);
2247
2254typedef void (*natsErrHandler)(
2255 natsConnection *nc, natsSubscription *subscription, natsStatus err,
2256 void *closure);
2257
2271typedef natsStatus (*natsEvLoop_Attach)(
2272 void **userData,
2273 void *loop,
2274 natsConnection *nc,
2275 natsSock socket);
2276
2286typedef natsStatus (*natsEvLoop_ReadAddRemove)(
2287 void *userData,
2288 bool add);
2289
2299typedef natsStatus (*natsEvLoop_WriteAddRemove)(
2300 void *userData,
2301 bool add);
2302
2310typedef natsStatus (*natsEvLoop_Detach)(
2311 void *userData);
2312
2334typedef natsStatus (*natsUserJWTHandler)(
2335 char **userJWT,
2336 char **customErrTxt,
2337 void *closure);
2338
2339
2365typedef natsStatus (*natsSignatureHandler)(
2366 char **customErrTxt,
2367 unsigned char **signature,
2368 int *signatureLength,
2369 const char *nonce,
2370 void *closure);
2371
2380typedef const char* (*natsTokenHandler)(void *closure);
2381
2382
2390typedef void (*natsOnCompleteCB)(void *closure);
2391
2412typedef int64_t (*natsCustomReconnectDelayHandler)(natsConnection *nc, int attempts, void *closure);
2413
2437typedef int (*natsSSLVerifyCb)(int preverifyOk, void *ctx);
2438
2439#ifdef BUILD_IN_DOXYGEN
2473typedef void (*jsPubAckErrHandler)(jsCtx *js, jsPubAckErr *pae, void *closure);
2474
2516typedef void (*jsPubAckHandler)(jsCtx *js, natsMsg *msg, jsPubAck *pa, jsPubAckErr *pae, void *closure);
2517
2558typedef void (*natsThreadStartedHandler)(void *closure);
2559#endif
2560
2561#if defined(NATS_HAS_STREAMING)
2570typedef void (*stanPubAckHandler)(const char *guid, const char *error, void *closure);
2571
2581typedef void (*stanMsgHandler)(
2582 stanConnection *sc, stanSubscription *sub, const char *channel, stanMsg *msg, void *closure);
2583
2590typedef void (*stanConnectionLostHandler)(
2591 stanConnection *sc, const char* errorTxt, void *closure);
2592#endif
2593
// end of callbacksGroup
2595
2596//
2597// Functions.
2598//

2686nats_CheckCompatibilityImpl(uint32_t reqVerNumber, uint32_t verNumber, const char *verString);

2688#endif

3045/*
3046 * The above is for doxygen. The proper syntax for username/password
3047 * is without the '\' character:
3048 *
3049 * nats://localhost:4222
3050 * nats://user@localhost:4222
3051 * nats://user:password@localhost:4222
3052 */

9765//
9766// Microservices.
9767//
9768
9811typedef struct micro_client_s microClient;
9812
9816typedef struct __for_forward_compatibility_only microClientConfig;
9817
9827typedef struct micro_endpoint_s microEndpoint;
9828
9836typedef struct micro_endpoint_config_s microEndpointConfig;
9837
9847typedef struct micro_endpoint_info_s microEndpointInfo;
9848
9857typedef struct micro_endpoint_stats_s microEndpointStats;
9858
9871typedef struct micro_error_s microError;
9872
9880typedef struct micro_group_s microGroup;
9881
9888typedef struct micro_group_config_s microGroupConfig;
9889
9895typedef struct micro_request_s microRequest;
9896
9908typedef struct micro_service_s microService;
9909
9919typedef struct micro_service_config_s microServiceConfig;
9920
9930typedef struct micro_service_info_s microServiceInfo;
9931
9938typedef struct micro_service_stats_s microServiceStats;
9939
9940
9941extern NATS_EXTERN microError *micro_ErrorOutOfMemory;
9942extern NATS_EXTERN microError *micro_ErrorInvalidArg;
9943
// end of microTypes
9945
9964typedef microError *(*microRequestHandler)(microRequest *req);
9965
9988typedef void (*microErrorHandler)(microService *m, microEndpoint *ep, natsStatus s);
9989
10001typedef void (*microDoneHandler)(microService *m);
10002
// end of microCallbacks
10004
10015struct micro_endpoint_config_s
10016{
10022 const char *Name;
10023
10033 const char *Subject;
10034
10039 const char *QueueGroup;
10040
10045 bool NoQueueGroup;
10046
10051 natsMetadata Metadata;
10052
10056 microRequestHandler Handler;
10057
10062 void *State;
10063};
10064
10068struct micro_endpoint_info_s
10069{
10073 const char *Name;
10074
10078 const char *Subject;
10079
10084 const char *QueueGroup;
10085
10090 natsMetadata Metadata;
10091};
10092
10096struct micro_endpoint_stats_s
10097{
10098 const char *Name;
10099 const char *Subject;
10100
10105 const char *QueueGroup;
10106
10110 int64_t NumRequests;
10111
10116 int64_t NumErrors;
10117
10121 int64_t ProcessingTimeSeconds;
10122
10126 int64_t ProcessingTimeNanoseconds;
10127
10131 int64_t AverageProcessingTimeNanoseconds;
10132
10136 char LastErrorString[2048];
10137};
10138
10142struct micro_group_config_s
10143{
10145 const char *Prefix;
10146
10148 const char *QueueGroup;
10149
10151 bool NoQueueGroup;
10152};
10153
10160struct micro_service_config_s
10161{
10167 const char *Name;
10168
10172 const char *Version;
10173
10177 const char *Description;
10178
10183 const char *QueueGroup;
10184
10189 bool NoQueueGroup;
10190
10195 natsMetadata Metadata;
10196
10204 microEndpointConfig *Endpoint;
10205
10213 microRequestHandler StatsHandler;
10214
10222 microErrorHandler ErrHandler;
10223
10232 microDoneHandler DoneHandler;
10233
10241 void *State;
10242};
10243
10249struct micro_service_info_s
10250{
10254 const char *Type;
10255
10259 const char *Name;
10260
10264 const char *Version;
10265
10269 const char *Description;
10270
10274 const char *Id;
10275
10279 natsMetadata Metadata;
10280
10284 microEndpointInfo *Endpoints;
10285
10289 int EndpointsLen;
10290};
10291
10295struct micro_service_stats_s
10296{
10300 const char *Type;
10301
10305 const char *Name;
10306
10310 const char *Version;
10311
10315 const char *Id;
10316
10320 int64_t Started;
10321
10325 microEndpointStats *Endpoints;
10326
10330 int EndpointsLen;
10331};
10332
// end of microStructs
10334

Read the last connection error into a user provided buffer.

Closes the connection.

NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_Flush(natsConnection *nc)
Flushes the connection.

Test if connection is draining.

Returns the current state of the connection.

Gets the server Id.

Test if connection has been closed.

NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_Drain(natsConnection *nc)
Drains the connection with default timeout.

Test if connection is reconnecting.

Gets the connection statistics.

Returns the maximum message payload.

Signs any 'message' using the connection's user credentials.
natsConnection_GetName
NATS_EXTERN const char * natsConnection_GetName(natsConnection *nc)
Returns the name of this connection.
natsConnection_Connect
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_Connect(natsConnection **nc, natsOptions *options)
Connects to a NATS Server using the provided options.
natsConnection_GetClientID
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_GetClientID(natsConnection *nc, uint64_t *cid)
Gets the current client ID assigned by the server.
natsConnection_FlushTimeout
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_FlushTimeout(natsConnection *nc, int64_t timeout)
Flushes the connection with a given timeout.

NATS_EXTERN void natsConnection_ProcessDetachedEvent(natsConnection *nc)
Process a detach event when using external event loop.
natsConnection_ProcessCloseEvent
NATS_EXTERN void natsConnection_ProcessCloseEvent(natsSock *socket)
Process a socket close event when using external event loop.
natsConnection_GetLocalIPAndPort
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_GetLocalIPAndPort(natsConnection *nc, char **ip, int *port)
Returns the connection local IP and port.
natsConnection_GetRTT
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_GetRTT(natsConnection *nc, int64_t *rtt)
Returns the round trip time between this client and the server.
natsConnection_ProcessReadEvent
NATS_EXTERN void natsConnection_ProcessReadEvent(natsConnection *nc)
Process a read event when using external event loop.
natsConnection_GetLastError
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_GetLastError(natsConnection *nc, const char **lastError)
Gets the last connection error.
natsConnection_GetDiscoveredServers
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_GetDiscoveredServers(natsConnection *nc, char ***servers, int *count)
Returns the list of discovered server URLs.
natsConnection_HasHeaderSupport
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_HasHeaderSupport(natsConnection *nc)
Returns if the connection to current server supports headers.
natsConnection_ProcessWriteEvent
NATS_EXTERN void natsConnection_ProcessWriteEvent(natsConnection *nc)
Process a write event when using external event loop.
natsConnection_GetClientIP
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_GetClientIP(natsConnection *nc, char **ip)
Returns the client's IP address as reported by the server.
natsConnection_DrainTimeout
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_DrainTimeout(natsConnection *nc, int64_t timeout)
Drains the connection with given timeout.
natsConnection_GetServers
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_GetServers(natsConnection *nc, char ***servers, int *count)
Returns the list of server URLs known to this connection.
natsConnection_GetConnectedUrl
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsConnection_GetConnectedUrl(natsConnection *nc, char *buffer, size_t bufferSize)
Gets the URL of the currently connected server.

Connects to a NATS Server using any of the URL from the given list.

Destroys the connection object.

natsOptions_SetMaxPendingMsgs
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetMaxPendingMsgs(natsOptions *opts, int maxPending)
Sets the maximum number of pending messages per subscription.
natsOptions_SetReconnectBufSize
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetReconnectBufSize(natsOptions *opts, int reconnectBufSize)
Sets the size of the backing buffer used during reconnect.
natsOptions_SetVerbose
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetVerbose(natsOptions *opts, bool verbose)
Sets the verbose mode.
natsOptions_SetSecure
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetSecure(natsOptions *opts, bool secure)
Sets the secure mode.
natsOptions_LoadCertificatesChainDynamic
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_LoadCertificatesChainDynamic(natsOptions *opts, const char *certsFileName, const char *keyFileName)
Loads the certificate chain and key from a file on every connection attempt.
natsOptions_SetNoRandomize
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetNoRandomize(natsOptions *opts, bool noRandomize)
Indicate if the servers list should be randomized.
natsOptions_SetWriteDeadline
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetWriteDeadline(natsOptions *opts, int64_t deadline)
Sets the write deadline.
natsOptions_SetMaxPingsOut
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetMaxPingsOut(natsOptions *opts, int maxPingsOut)
Sets the limit of outstanding PINGs without corresponding PONGs.
natsOptions_SetEventLoop
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetEventLoop(natsOptions *opts, void *loop, natsEvLoop_Attach attachCb, natsEvLoop_ReadAddRemove readCb, natsEvLoop_WriteAddRemove writeCb, natsEvLoop_Detach detachCb)
Sets the external event loop and associated callbacks.
natsOptions_SetMaxReconnect
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetMaxReconnect(natsOptions *opts, int maxReconnect)
Sets the maximum number of reconnect attempts.
natsOptions_SetDiscoveredServersCB
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetDiscoveredServersCB(natsOptions *opts, natsConnectionHandler discoveredServersCb, void *closure)
Sets the callback to be invoked when new servers are discovered.
natsOptions_UseGlobalMessageDelivery
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_UseGlobalMessageDelivery(natsOptions *opts, bool global)
Switch on/off the use of a central message delivery thread pool.
natsOptions_SetCustomInboxPrefix
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetCustomInboxPrefix(natsOptions *opts, const char *inboxPrefix)
Sets a custom inbox prefix.
natsOptions_TLSHandshakeFirst
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_TLSHandshakeFirst(natsOptions *opts)
Performs TLS handshake first.
natsOptions_SetServers
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetServers(natsOptions *opts, const char **servers, int serversCount)
Set the list of servers to try to (re)connect to.
natsOptions_SetToken
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetToken(natsOptions *opts, const char *token)
Sets the token to use when not specified in the URL.
natsOptions_SetProxyConnHandler
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetProxyConnHandler(natsOptions *opts, natsProxyConnHandler proxyConnHandler, void *closure)
Sets the proxy connection handler.
natsOptions_SetDisconnectedCB
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetDisconnectedCB(natsOptions *opts, natsConnectionHandler disconnectedCb, void *closure)
Sets the callback to be invoked when the connection to a server is lost.
natsOptions_SetFailRequestsOnDisconnect
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetFailRequestsOnDisconnect(natsOptions *opts, bool failRequests)
Fails pending requests on disconnect event.
natsOptions_SetPingInterval
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetPingInterval(natsOptions *opts, int64_t interval)
Sets the ping interval.
natsOptions_SetCertificatesChain
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus natsOptions_SetCertificatesChain(natsOptions *opts, const char *cert, const char *key)
Sets the client certificate and key.
natsOptions_SetCATrustedCertificates

Sets the trusted CA certificates from memory.

Sets the timeout for waiting for an ACK for a published message.

Sets the URL to connect to.

Sets the NATS Options to use to create the connection.

@ js_PersistDefault
Writes are immediately flushed, acknowledgement sent after message is stored.

js_DiscardOld

js_ReplayInstant
